utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package, all 7 fields are present, but most are not fully specified. Destination: not chosen (placeholder). Travel_dates: specific dates given (July 10–14, 2024) — fully specified. Transportation: not specified (to be confirmed) — missing details and costs. Accommodation: not specified (to be confirmed) — missing selection and costs. Activities: generic description — missing selected activities and costs. Additional_services: generic mention — lacks specific services and costs. Total_budget: €1,700 but says breakdown to be finalized — missing complete cost breakdown. Therefore, only 1 of 7 is fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package does not specify any concrete items from the ground-truth lists. All entries are placeholders like 'to be confirmed' or 'curated activities' without naming a destination, transportation class, accommodation type, activities, restaurants, or services that can be matched to the provided rated options. Therefore, there are no items to map to ratings.
